description: Root category for all diagnostic rules
label: RuleCategory
name: DiagnosticRuleRoot

description: Rules for loops, boundaries, and progress
label: RuleCategory
name: LoopDiagnosis

description: Rules for arrays, indexing, and traversal
label: RuleCategory
name: ArrayAndIndexDiagnosis

description: Rules for pointer validity, ownership, and memory lifetime
label: RuleCategory
name: PointerAndMemoryDiagnosis

description: Rules for return behavior and function-level obligations
label: RuleCategory
name: FunctionContractDiagnosis

description: Rules for base case and recursive progress
label: RuleCategory
name: RecursionDiagnosis

description: Rules for iterators, ranges, and container invalidation
label: RuleCategory
name: IteratorAndRangeDiagnosis

description: Rules for virtual dispatch, polymorphic destruction, and RAII
label: RuleCategory
name: OOPLifetimeDiagnosis

description: Rules for formatted input/output and printing APIs
label: RuleCategory
name: IOFormattingDiagnosis

description: Rules for threads, mutexes, atomics, and condition variables
label: RuleCategory
name: ConcurrencyDiagnosis

description: Cross-cutting rules that combine multiple evidence types
label: RuleCategory
name: MetaAndCrossChecks

description: Pattern extracted from abstract syntax tree shape or syntax form.
label: ToolSignature
name: ASTInspection

description: Pattern extracted from control-flow graph shape.
label: ToolSignature
name: CFGInspection

description: Pattern extracted from value, alias, or lifetime flow.
label: ToolSignature
name: DataFlowInspection

description: Derived from Clang Static Analyzer findings or equivalent path-sensitive analyzers.
label: ToolSignature
name: ClangStaticAnalyzer

description: Derived from compiler diagnostics and warnings.
label: ToolSignature
name: CompilerWarning

description: Derived from failed edge-case or specification tests.
label: ToolSignature
name: UnitTestFailure

description: Derived from observed crash, timeout, hang, or anomalous runtime behavior.
label: ToolSignature
name: RuntimeObservation

description: Derived from tools such as AddressSanitizer, UBSan, or thread sanitizers.
label: ToolSignature
name: Sanitizer

description: Derived from linting or best-practice checks for modern C++.
label: ToolSignature
name: ModernCppLinter

description: Loop condition uses <= length or <= size while indexing from zero.
label: EvidencePattern
name: LoopBoundaryUsesLessEqualLength

description: Traversal over zero-indexed storage starts at 1 and misses or shifts valid positions.
label: EvidencePattern
name: LoopStartsAtOneForZeroIndexedTraversal

description: Loop variable or termination state is never updated toward exit.
label: EvidencePattern
name: LoopVariableNotUpdated

description: Loop variable update moves away from satisfying exit condition.
label: EvidencePattern
name: LoopVariableMovesAwayFromExit

description: Tests fail only on the final boundary element or exact-size edge case.
label: EvidencePattern
name: FailsOnlyOnLastElementCase

description: Observed timeout or hang in a loop-heavy region.
label: EvidencePattern
name: RuntimeTimeoutInLoopRegion

description: Array or vector is directly indexed by its length/size result.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ArrayIndexedBySizeValue

description: Logic mixes roles of array element values and positions.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ArrayValueUsedAsIndexOrViceVersa

description: Boundary test triggers crash or invalid access symptom.
label: EvidencePattern
name: OutOfBoundsCrashOnBoundaryTest

description: Pointer is dereferenced on a path lacking a guard or ownership guarantee.
label: EvidencePattern
name: PointerDereferencedWithoutGuard

description: Static analyzer reports null dereference possibility.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ClangNullDereferenceFinding

description: Ownership path contains allocation but no matching release or RAII handoff.
label: EvidencePattern
name: AllocationWithoutMatchingRelease

description: Data-flow shows pointer/resource used after free/delete.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ReleaseThenUseAccess

description: Lifetime path contains duplicated release of the same resource.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ResourceReleasedTwice

description: Sanitizer reports heap-use-after-free or invalid lifetime access.
label: EvidencePattern
name: SanitizerUseAfterFreeFinding

description: Leak sanitizer or instrumentation shows unreleased allocations.
label: EvidencePattern
name: SanitizerLeakFinding

description: Compiler warns that control reaches end of non-void function.
label: EvidencePattern
name: CompilerWarnsControlReachesEndNonVoid

description: At least one control-flow path exits without a return in non-void function.
label: EvidencePattern
name: NonVoidPathMissingReturn

description: Recursive function lacks a valid base case branch.
label: EvidencePattern
name: RecursiveFunctionWithoutBaseCase

description: A base case exists syntactically but cannot be reached for relevant inputs.
label: EvidencePattern
name: RecursiveBaseCaseUnreachable

description: Recursive call fails to reduce problem size toward a base case.
label: EvidencePattern
name: RecursiveCallDoesNotReduceProblem

description: Iterator/reference survives a modification that invalidates it.
label: EvidencePattern
name: IteratorUsedAfterContainerModification

description: Iterator is used after erase/pop/reallocation-like operations.
label: EvidencePattern
name: IteratorUsedAfterErase

description: Non-owning range/view outlives or outscopes its underlying source.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ViewOrRangeOutlivesSource

description: Object is read as though unchanged after move operation.
label: EvidencePattern
name: MovedFromObjectUsedAsIfUnchanged

description: Delete is applied through base pointer lacking virtual destructor.
label: EvidencePattern
name: DeleteThroughBaseWithoutVirtualDestructor

description: Resource-owning class defines only some copy/move/destructor members.
label: EvidencePattern
name: CustomOwnerDefinesPartialSpecialMembers

description: Exceptional path can bypass manual cleanup or leave partial state.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ManualCleanupOnExceptionalPath

description: Format specifier and actual argument type do not match.
label: EvidencePattern
name: PrintfSpecifierTypeMismatch

description: Unsafe legacy formatting is used where safer type-aware formatting is expected.
label: EvidencePattern
name: UnsafeCFormattingPreferredOverTypeSafeFormatting

description: Condition variable wait is not wrapped in a predicate-checking loop.
label: EvidencePattern
name: ConditionWaitWithoutPredicateLoop

description: Shared state and notify/wait protocol are not synchronized consistently.
label: EvidencePattern
name: NotifyAndStateProtocolBroken

description: Shared mutable state accessed across threads without evident synchronization.
label: EvidencePattern
name: SharedStateAccessWithoutSynchronization

description: Most tests pass but edge cases fail, suggesting boundary or contract issue.
label: EvidencePattern
name: FailsOnlyOnEdgeCaseTests

description: Detect off-by-one traversal logic when a loop uses <= length while indexing from zero.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectOffByOneFromLessEqualLength

description: Detect off-by-one behavior when traversal starts at one in zero-indexed structures.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectOffByOneFromStartOne

description: Detect infinite loop caused by missing progress update.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectInfiniteLoopFromMissingUpdate

description: Detect infinite loop when progress moves away from exit condition.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectInfiniteLoopFromWrongDirection

description: Infer boundary bug from failure isolated to last/edge element tests.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectBoundaryLogicFromEdgeCaseFailure

description: Detect out-of-bounds access where array/container is indexed by its size directly.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectArrayOutOfBoundsFromSizeIndex

description: Detect confusion between index and value roles in traversal/update logic.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectIndexValueRoleConfusion

description: Detect possible null dereference from an unsafe dereference pattern.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectNullDereferenceFromUnsafeDereference

description: Attach null dereference diagnosis when the static analyzer reports it.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectNullDereferenceFromAnalyzer

description: Detect memory leak from ownership flow missing a release or RAII handoff.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectMemoryLeakFromMissingRelease

description: Detect use-after-free when data-flow shows access after release.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectUseAfterFreeFromDataFlow

description: Detect double release of the same ownership resource.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectDoubleFreeFromDataFlow

description: Trust sanitizer evidence for use-after-free diagnosis.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectUseAfterFreeFromSanitizer

description: Trust sanitizer or leak instrumentation for memory leak diagnosis.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectMemoryLeakFromSanitizer

description: Detect missing return in non-void function from compiler diagnostic.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectMissingReturnFromCompilerWarning

description: Detect missing return by finding a control-flow path with no return.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectMissingReturnFromCFG

description: Detect recursion bug when no valid base case is present.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectWrongBaseCaseFromMissingBase

description: Detect recursion bug when base case exists but is unreachable.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectWrongBaseCaseFromUnreachableBase

description: Detect recursive non-progress when recursive calls do not reduce problem size.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectNoRecursiveProgress

description: Detect iterator invalidation caused by modify-then-use pattern.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectIteratorInvalidationAfterModification

description: Detect view or range lifetime misuse when source outlives assumptions fail.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectRangeViewLifetimeIssue

description: Detect invalid dependence on moved-from object state.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectUseAfterMove

description: Detect missing virtual destructor when deleting through base pointer.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectMissingVirtualDestructor

description: Detect a likely Rule of Five violation in a resource-owning type.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectRuleOfFiveViolation

description: Detect likely exception-safety issue from manual cleanup on exceptional path.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectExceptionSafetyViolation

description: Detect mismatch between formatting specifier and argument type.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectFormatSpecifierMismatch

description: Recommend upgrading from unsafe formatting to type-safe modern formatting APIs.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: RecommendTypeSafeFormatting

description: Detect condition variable wait misuse without predicate-based waiting.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectConditionVariableProtocolMisuse

description: Detect unsafe shared-state access with insufficient synchronization evidence.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: DetectSharedStateWithoutSynchronization

description: Use cross-evidence from edge-case failures to strengthen boundary-related diagnoses.
label: DiagnosticRule
name: CrossCheckBoundaryBugFromEdgeCasePattern
